training_tokens.as_published: 4 Trillion (model card architecture table); stage-1 pretraining on OLMo-mix-1124 is 3.9T tokens at ~1 epoch, stage-2 (Dolmino) adds <=50B per soup member for the 7B

ac_config_adaptations: None beyond schema transcription. All fields taken verbatim from the official HF config.json; attention is MHA (n_kv_heads == n_heads == 32).

metadata.params.total_b/active_b = 7.3B is the count AC's own parameter ledger computes from this architecture block (7,298,351,104); AC requires metadata to agree with its ledger within 2%. The family name '7B' is the published label.

prediction_inputs.note: evaluation context == pretraining context so the context_utility term is identically zero: the anchor is the training-distribution loss at the published token count.
